{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Singing Bones
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Del’rek has the [[Path of Singing Bones]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I didn’t have too many samples of your Path of Singing Bones,” Lindon said.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
